title: trifolium stolzii
intro: Trifolium stolzii is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, commonly known as a type of clover. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Trifolium stolzii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and ointments.
